title.en: Therefore, it must descend to other dimensional...

content.en:
"I'm afraid the strength of this powerful weird thing is extremely powerful!"

Ye Tian knew that he had to improve his strength as soon as possible, otherwise he would not be able to survive.

It is best to master the ultimate dimension kill move at the first advent, if you can't master the ultimate dimension kill move when you come to the same dimensional world many times, then it is unlikely to master the ultimate dimension kill move.

After all, at that time, he had already left here and returned to the Upper Domain, which would inevitably be contaminated with other information and interfere with his way of the Trick Domain.

Therefore, it must descend to other dimensional heaven and earth.

The Lord of the Void Immortal Realm came seven times and mastered an ultimate dimensional killing move, but it was not in the same dimensional world, but a large number of dimensional worlds were changed, and finally mastered an ultimate dimensional killing move.

Because of this, every opportunity to descend on the dimensional heaven and earth is precious, and if you can, don't fall.

"If I want to grow up quickly, I must copy a higher talent of trickery, and I have to collect more trick cheats to perfect my Dark Star Secret Method!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, he began to touch other people's bodies, intentionally or unintentionally, to spy on other people's talents.

At this time, 01, his eight-year-old age is undoubtedly the best protection, even if he touches others, people will not have any anger.

And just like that, the day passed.

"Top trick talent!"

Ye Tian was in a good mood, after obtaining this tricky talent, he could at least grow up quickly.

However, there must be higher talents in this small city, but most of them are in those strong people, and he can't touch them for the time being.

After that, he began to collect more trick cheats.

As a result, some high-level officials of the Tooth Gang were targeted by him again.

He set his sights on the various stations of the Tooth Gang, and with the tricks he perfected many times, he easily stole a large number of trick cheats.

At the same time, he also targeted some families and also stole some cheats.

In a short period of time, he obtained a large number of trickery cheats.

During this period, he also attracted the attention of some strong people, but Ye Tian's tricks were very special, and none of these strong people found any trace of him.

In this way, Ye Tian obtained a large number of trick cheats, and began to study and improve the Dark Star Secret Method.

Soon after, his Dark Star Secret Method was perfected again, and coupled with the top-level Trick Talent, his cultivation speed was many times faster than before.

this day.

Ye Tian's spiritual power was so strong that he was about to undergo his first transformation.

Rumble!!!!!

The spiritual power absorbed a large amount of treacherous power and began to skyrocket.

In a short period of time, his spiritual power completely completed the first transformation.

Now, he can be regarded as a real introduction to the sophistry.

"The spiritual power is more than ten times stronger, and the spiritual power is even tougher, and it even has a special aura. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he began to create other tricks, and in addition to tricksters, he also had to create some special killing moves.

The trick is mainly to kill people invisibly, which is very weird, and it is easy to distinguish the winner from the loser.

Because the body of the sophistical strong is too weak, once he loses, his physical body will be shattered, and only spiritual power remains.

Therefore, the battle between the sophistication powerhouses will not last.

Time passed, and another month passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's spiritual power skyrocketed again, and he created two trick killing moves, one was the dark force field, which could form a distorted force field on the surface of the body with strong spiritual power, thus forming a certain defense, so that the enemy's trick power could not invade his body.

The second trick is Void Condensation, which is a killing move that uses spiritual power to fix the enemy's body and suppress the void to achieve void condensation.

He prepares to freeze the enemy with the condensation of the void, and then crush the enemy's body with his trickery and slay him.

With his current strength, even if he is a sophistication powerhouse whose spiritual power has completed three transformations, it is estimated that he is not his opponent.

After all, the trickery cheats in this small city are all rubbish, and the strength of the strong here is naturally very weak.

However, it was still impossible for him to beat the strange thing outside the city.

So, he still has to grow.

"I have to pay a better talent for trickery, otherwise my speed of absorbing trickery power is limited!"

Ye Tian was going to touch some of the powerhouses in the city.

......

Tooth Gang, HQ.

At this time, Han Dongying, the leader of the Tooth Gang, was very flustered.

"Damn, there's no way out now, that monster won't be able to swallow the whole city in too long. It's time for the fear of the city to soar, and once it's reached a certain limit, it's time for it to enjoy its food. "

"What should I do? The strength of the other party is too strong, and all of us together cannot be its opponent!"

Suddenly.

An eerie aura permeated.

"Who?"

Han Dongying's spiritual power spread out, and he quickly locked on an eight-year-old child, and the other party stood out of thin air, walking step by step.

"Kids?"

"Definitely not!"

He could feel that this child was just a spiritual transformation, and his strength should not be strong, but why did it give him an extremely terrifying feeling?

This kid is Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian cast a void condensation, instantly condensing Han Dongying.

Followed by.

Ye Tian walked over to 550, touched Han Dongying with one hand, and then left quickly?

It wasn't until Ye Tian left that he couldn't stop shivering.

"It's too powerful, it's definitely a tricky powerhouse comparable to three spiritual transformations, I'm only two spiritual power transformations, far inferior to him!" Han Dongying said secretly.

He didn't understand why Ye Tian didn't attack him, he just touched him.

"What did you leave on me?"

He searched his body, but he couldn't find any marks.

......

"The talent of this Tooth Gang leader is really good, a three-star trick talent. "

After Ye Tian went back, he fused this three-star trick talent, and his cultivation speed really skyrocketed.

After that, he found some other trick powerhouses, and the best trick talent was the five-star trick talent.

Then, he didn't copy a better talent for trickery.

"Five-star tricky talent, this should be the best talent in this small city, so be it for now!"

After that, he practiced hard and tried to have enough strength to escape when the strange thing swallowed the entire city.

In a flash, another month passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's spiritual power finally ushered in the second transformation.

Once this transformation is completed, his strength will almost become the strongest here.
